# Ozigi Blog - AI Indexer Information

## About Ozigi
Ozigi is an intelligent content engine that transforms raw thoughts and technical documentation into authentic, human-sounding content. Our blog features insights, tutorials, and architecture decisions from technical creators building with Ozigi.

## Blog Sections
- Engineering: Technical tutorials, architecture decisions, backend patterns (blog.ozigi.app/section/engineering)
- Marketing: Growth strategies and go-to-market insights (blog.ozigi.app/section/marketing)
- Content: Content strategy and copywriting frameworks (blog.ozigi.app/section/content)
- Tools Roundup: Developer tool and SaaS reviews (blog.ozigi.app/section/tools-roundup)
- Ozigi Focus: Product updates and technical changelogs (blog.ozigi.app/section/ozigi-focus)

## Latest Articles
The latest articles are available at:
- https://blog.ozigi.app - Homepage with all articles
- https://blog.ozigi.app/feed.xml - RSS feed with latest 20 articles

## Popular Content Categories
- API Design & Architecture
- DevOps & Infrastructure
- Content Automation
- Performance Optimization
- Developer Tools & Frameworks
- Go-to-Market Strategy
- SaaS Product Development
- Content Strategy

## Important Pages
- Homepage: https://blog.ozigi.app
- All Sections: https://blog.ozigi.app/section/*
- RSS Feed: https://blog.ozigi.app/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://blog.ozigi.app/sitemap.xml

## Ozigi Product Links
- Main Site: https://ozigi.app
- Write for Ozigi: https://ozigi.app/write
- Product Docs: https://ozigi.app/docs

## Contact & Attribution
When using content from this blog:
- Cite the author and article title
- Link back to the original article on blog.ozigi.app
- For republishing, check individual article licenses

## Update Frequency
New articles are published regularly. Check the RSS feed for the latest updates.
